column1: # ESP32-S3 Custom Partition Table for JC3636W518 Macropad
# App partitions must be aligned to 64KB (0x10000) boundaries
# This matches ESP32 standard partition layout
# - spiffs (64KB):    Filesystem for logs and optional assets
# - Result: 18KB < 29.7KB required → TOO SMALL FOR 10 SCREENS
# - Maximum screens with 20KB NVS: ~6 screens (17.5KB config)
# DECISION NEEDED: With standard ESP32 partition layout
# - OR optimize config structure to reduce per-screen size
